title: selago griquana
intro: Selago griquana, also known as the "Griqua's spike", is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selago griquana include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and provide relief from chest congestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water, or as a tincture, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal properties.
